Description: Heap buffer overflow in libxml2 XML parser allows remote code execution via crafted document.
URL parsing confusion in wget lets an attacker redirect downloads to an attacker-controlled host.
Buffer overflow in the glibc dynamic loader (Looney Tunables) enables local privilege escalation.
Out-of-bounds write in the glibc ISO-2022-CN-EXT conversion module.
Use-after-free in libexpat during XML entity processing.
